_meta.doc: LOOT tables (generator roadmap / drops). What drops from what, rolled by src/systems/loot.js (pure, seeded → replay-safe) via the `loot` event command. Enemies drop crafting MATERIALS + Credits (combat already pays Credits) and rarely GEAR; chests drop consumables + gear; caches/bosses drop gear and (rarely) a RELIC. Gear rarity is rolled from gear.json's rarityWeight; relics are the rare tier (only one equippable). Materials feed the future crafting system.

materials.name: Beast Hide
materials.desc: Hide from a twisted creature. Leatherwork stock.

materials.name: Crystal Shard
materials.desc: A humming shard of dungeon crystal. Reagent.

materials.name: Sigil Dust
materials.desc: Residue of a broken System sigil. Rare reagent.
